days.desc: Arrive from Bangkok via EVA Air

activityItems.text: 🎧 Rick Steves Vienna City Walk: Opera → Café Sacher → Stephansdom → Graben → Hofburg → Heldenplatz
activityItems.notes: Print RS map and use AirPods. Stops: Opera, Café Sacher, Albertinaplatz/Albertina, Kärntner Strasse, Kaisergruft, Neuer Markt, Stephansdom/Stephansplatz, Graben, Dorotheergasse, Plague Column, St. Peter’s Church, Kohlmarkt/Demel, Michaelerplatz, Hofburg, Heldenplatz. Allow 2.5–3 hrs including photo/coffee pauses.

activityItems.text: 🍽 Flexible lunch/coffee stop built into the RS route — Café Sacher, Demel or Naschmarkt depending energy
activityItems.notes: Use this as a proper pause after the audio walk rather than rushing straight to another major sight.

activityItems.text: 🎨 Belvedere Palace & Klimt’s The Kiss — optional if still fresh after the RS walk
activityItems.notes: Keep this as the main optional add-on; skip if jetlag hits and just do Donaukanal/Prater instead.

activityItems.text: 🌳 Low-key Prater / Donaukanal evening walk only if energy remains
activityItems.notes: No need to force this after the long-haul arrival and RS walk.

activityItems.text: ☕ Quick Vienna coffee + station buffer before Bratislava train
activityItems.notes: Keep this light; the real Vienna hit was the RS walk on arrival day.

activityItems.text: 🌙 Easy arrival preview: Old Town Square → Astronomical Clock → Charles Bridge at night
activityItems.notes: Light orientation only after the train; save the proper Rick Steves audio walk for tomorrow morning.

activityItems.text: 🎧 Rick Steves Prague City Walk: Wenceslas Square → Old Town Square → Astronomical Clock → Charles Bridge
activityItems.notes: Print RS map and use AirPods. Stops: Wenceslas Square/National Museum, Hotel Europa/Velvet Revolution, Lucerna Arcade, Franciscan Garden, Můstek, Na Příkopě, Municipal House, Powder Tower, Celetná, Old Town Square, Astronomical Clock, Karlova Street, Charles IV Square, Charles Bridge. Allow 3 hrs with coffee/photo stops.

activityItems.text: ☕ Lunch/coffee pause after the RS Prague walk
activityItems.notes: Use this for a proper sit-down before climbing toward the Castle side.

activityItems.text: 🏰 Prague Castle district self-walk: Malá Strana steps → Castle courtyards → viewpoints
activityItems.notes: This keeps the Castle side grouped after the RS walk ends at Charles Bridge.

activityItems.text: 🕍 Josefov Jewish Quarter or Letná beer garden/viewpoint — choose based on energy
activityItems.notes: Josefov is the cultural add-on; Letná is the low-effort sunset/view option.

activityItems.text: 🌄 Castle district / Letná dusk viewpoint
activityItems.notes: Optional finish; drop this if the RS walk + Castle day is already enough.

activityItems.text: ☕ Early Prague coffee only before FlixBus
activityItems.notes: No major activity before the 09:10 FlixBus.

activityItems.text: 💼 Conference check-in & afternoon sessions
🍺 Low-effort Marienplatz / Hofbräuhaus orientation dinner
activityItems.notes: Keep this casual; the proper RS Munich audio walk is scheduled for the free day.

activityItems.text: 💼 Full conference day

activityItems.notes: Good evening cluster after sitting in sessions all day.

activityItems.text: 💼 Final conference sessions
🍺 Augustiner-Keller low-effort Munich evening
activityItems.notes: Easy beer-hall night without turning it into another big walk.

activityItems.text: 🎧 Rick Steves Munich City Walk: Marienplatz → Viktualienmarkt → Asam Church → Dallmayr → Hofbräuhaus → Residenz → Hofgarten
activityItems.notes: Print RS map and use AirPods. Stops: Marienplatz, St Peter’s Church, Viktualienmarkt, Jewish Synagogue/City Museum, Asam Church, Sendlinger Strasse, Kaufingerstrasse, Frauenkirche, Marienhof, Dallmayr, Platzl, Hofbräuhaus, Maximilianstrasse, Max-Joseph-Platz, Residenz, Viscardigasse, Odeonsplatz, Hofgarten. Allow 3–3.5 hrs including lunch/beer/coffee pauses.

activityItems.text: 🍽 Lunch/beer/coffee pause built into the RS Munich route — Viktualienmarkt, Dallmayr or Hofbräuhaus
activityItems.notes: Treat this as part of the walk rather than a separate cross-town move.

activityItems.text: 🏟 Olympiapark + BMW Welt afternoon loop
activityItems.notes: Keeps the afternoon in one northern cluster after the old-town RS walk.

activityItems.text: 🌳 Optional Nymphenburg canal path or relaxed old-town dinner
activityItems.notes: Only do Nymphenburg if you still want more walking; otherwise keep dinner central.

activityItems.text: ☕ Munich breakfast + station buffer before Bolzano train
activityItems.notes: Do not schedule a major sight before the 11:23 train.

legTips.text: Confirm conference hotel location with Simon ASAP
English Garden: bigger than Central Park! Watch Eisbach surfers near Haus der Kunst
Viktualienmarkt closed Sundays
Dallmayr: mustard, sausages
Book Allianz Arena tour in advance - English tours sell out fast
Day trip idea: Salzburg by train (1.5h) - early start if skipping last conf day

activityItems.text: 🌆 Easy Milan arrival: Brera wander + dinner, no major Duomo tour yet

activityItems.text: 🎧 Rick Steves Milan Duomo Neighborhood: Duomo exterior/interior/rooftop → Galleria → La Scala
activityItems.notes: Print RS map and use AirPods. Stops: Piazza del Duomo, Duomo exterior, side view, interior nave/right aisle/more sights, rooftop, Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, Piazza della Scala, La Scala Opera House. Allow 3 hrs if doing interior + rooftop slowly.
activityItems.location: Piazza del Duomo to La Scala

activityItems.text: 🍽 Lunch/coffee pause after the RS Duomo walk
activityItems.notes: Good moment to reassess whether you want more museums or a lighter afternoon.

legTips.text: Request early check-in at Homm
Book Ang Thong via Blue Star Sailing - smaller groups, better lunch
Na Muang 2: more dramatic than #1, wear grippy shoes for the hike
Elephant sanctuary: ~฿2,500pp including lunch
Friday Market: arrive 5pm to beat the crowd, incredible street food
Secret Garden: ~30min drive inland, rent a scooter - very steep road!
Silver Beach: calm clear water - best snorkelling right off the beach
Book Grab for 06:30 airport pickup tomorrow - morning traffic to USM

Duty-free allowance: 2.25L alcohol - buy in BKK
